info.title: IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenAConjugateVaccine2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenAConjugateVaccine2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

ValueSet-IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenAConjug.title: IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenAConjugateVaccine2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
ValueSet-IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenAConjug.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenAConjugateVaccine2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: Client's age is less than 3 months-41
Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination-48
No meningococcal primary series dose was administered-122
Client's age is more than or equal to 3 months-41
Client is due for meningococcal vaccination-44
One meningococcal primary series dose was administered-122
The latest meningococcal dose was administered less than 8 weeks ago-105
The latest meningococcal dose was administered more than 8 weeks ago-105
Two meningococcal primary series doses were administered-122

ValueSet-IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenAConjug.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenAConjugateVaccine2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenAConjugateVaccine2DosesVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
